# Implementation Plan: Implement Combobox Component

**Branch**: `001-implement-figma-component` | **Date**: 1 May 2026 | **Spec**: [spec.md](spec.md)
**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/001-implement-figma-component/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan defines the design and architecture decisions. Implementation tasks are in `tasks.md` (generated by `/speckit.tasks`).

## Summary

Implement an accessible Combobox component for the Aurora design system—an autocomplete input with filtering and command palette functionality. The component will be built with React + TypeScript using Radix UI primitives for accessibility, styled via semantic design tokens (Tailwind), and follow the Aurora API contract (forwardRef, className composition, controlled/uncontrolled support). The component will be published as a named export in the Aurora package and available in Storybook with full test coverage.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5.x, React 18.x (peer dependency)  
**Primary Dependencies**: Radix UI (`@radix-ui/react-popover`, `@radix-ui/primitive` for accessibility), clsx + tailwind-merge for className composition  
**Storage**: N/A (component-only, no backend storage)  
**Testing**: Vitest (unit tests), React Testing Library (DOM tests), Storybook (visual), axe-core (a11y)  
**Target Platform**: Browser (modern evergreen browsers, ES2020+)  
**Project Type**: Component library (npm package, exported as named export)  
**Performance Goals**: Lightweight bundle (< 15KB gzipped for component + dependencies), zero runtime layout shifts, 60 fps interactions  
**Constraints**: Tree-shakeable, no side effects, must consume all styling from design tokens (no hard-coded colors/spacing), WCAG 2.1 AA compliant, backward-compatible semver after release  
**Scale/Scope**: Single component with ~3 sub-components (ComboboxRoot, ComboboxInput, ComboboxMenu), supporting 2 states (default/open), keyboard + mouse interaction

## Constitution Check

_GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design._

Evaluating against Aurora Design System Constitution:

| Principle                              | Status | Notes                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| -------------------------------------- | ------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **I. Semantic Tokens Only**            | ✓ PASS | All styling will consume design tokens via Tailwind utilities (`bg-background`, `border-border`, `text-foreground`, etc.). No hard-coded colors, arbitrary Tailwind values, or inline styles allowed. |
| **II. Component API Contract**         | ✓ PASS | Component will use `forwardRef`, accept `className`, set `displayName`, support controlled/uncontrolled patterns, and implement `asChild` via Radix Slot.                                             |
| **III. Flat vs Compound Pattern**      | ✓ PASS | Simple component (Flat pattern). Combobox renders as a single logical unit despite internal state management. No independently composable sub-components exported.                                    |
| **IV. Accessibility**                  | ✓ PASS | Will use Radix UI (`@radix-ui/react-popover`) as accessibility backbone, implement ARIA roles/states/properties, support full keyboard navigation, and meet WCAG 2.1 AA.                              |
| **V. Theming — CSS Custom Properties** | ✓ PASS | All token values (colors, spacing, typography, shadows, radius) come from CSS custom properties. Light/dark switching via `data-theme` attribute on `:root`.                                          |
| **Package Contract**                   | ✓ PASS | Named export from package entry point, tree-shakeable, strict semver.                                                                                                                                 |

**Gate Result**: ✅ PASS — No violations. Proceed to Phase 0.

## Project Structure

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/001-implement-figma-component/
├── plan.md              # This file (Phase 1 output)
├── spec.md              # Feature specification (input)
├── research.md          # Phase 0 output (resolved unknowns)
├── data-model.md        # Phase 1 output (entities, props, state)
├── quickstart.md        # Phase 1 output (local dev guide)
├── contracts/           # Phase 1 output (API contracts)
│   └── combobox.md      # Component API definition
└── tasks.md             # Phase 2 output (actionable implementation tasks)
```

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
src/
├── components/
│   └── ui/
│       └── Combobox/
│           ├── index.ts              # Named export (tree-shakeable)
│           ├── Combobox.tsx           # Component implementation
│           ├── Combobox.types.ts      # TypeScript interfaces
│           ├── Combobox.stories.tsx   # Storybook documentation
│           ├── Combobox.test.tsx      # Unit tests (Vitest + RTL)
│           └── Combobox.a11y.test.tsx # Accessibility tests (axe-core)
├── styles/
│   └── tokens.css       # Design token definitions (existing)
└── lib/
    └── utils.ts         # cn() helper for className composition

storybook-static/       # Storybook build output (existing)
```

**Structure Decision**: Single project (Option 1). The Combobox is a new component in the Aurora UI library. Implementation follows the existing pattern used for Button, Input, and Tabs components in `src/components/ui/`.

## Complexity Tracking

No Constitution violations. This is a straightforward single-component feature following established Aurora patterns.
